UseLocalStack.description: Enables LocalStack as the S3-compatible object storage provider.

RunMode.description:
Controls how the three application services (API, Admin, Portal) are run.
- Project: run from source via project references (default, supports debugging).
- DockerFile: build and run from local Dockerfiles (validates containerisation locally).
- ContainerImage: pull and run pre-built images from GHCR (tests the exact images CI published).
